query:
SELECT 
  c.id, c.name AS contactName, c.title, c.company, c.linkedin, c.email,
  p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState
FROM contacts c
JOIN projects p ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.name ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT 
  c.id, c.name AS contactName, c.title, c.company, c.linkedin, c.email,
  p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState
FROM contacts c
JOIN projects p ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.name ASC;
